next_steps: Watch the worked example: npm install && npx hyperframes preview (windowed player, detection circles, scan timeline)
Replace clip1-3.mp4 with your source clips
Edit build.py: the CLIPS schema (timings, labels, detection callouts) to match your clips
Regenerate: python3 build.py (never edit index.html by hand)
QA + render: npx hyperframes lint && npx hyperframes render -o out.mp4 --quality draft
